name: agentic-loop
description: Agentic software development loop: task intake → planning with reviewer feedback iterations (max 5) → human approval → coding agents (frontend / backend / database) → code review with reiteration → documentation summary

settings.action: Ask the user to describe: the feature or problem, specific requirements, acceptance criteria, and relevant context (tech stack, constraints).

Using the original task and any prior reviewer feedback, write or update the implementation plan with these sections: 1) Executive Summary, 2) Task Breakdown (subtasks with owners: frontend/backend/database), 3) Acceptance Criteria (specific, testable), 4) Technical Approach (per-component design decisions), 5) Dependencies and Risks, 6) Revision History (append dated entry noting changes). Output the full updated plan.

Increment review_iteration by 1. Review the plan against original task requirements for: completeness, technical feasibility, correct acceptance criteria, edge case coverage, and clarity. If fully satisfactory: set has_feedback=false. Otherwise: set has_feedback=true and append specific actionable feedback to the plan's Revision History.
Present the plan (including revision history) and ask the user to reply 'approve' to proceed or 'reject' with specific comments to revise.

conditions.condition: human requests changes to the plan

settings.action: Implement all frontend components per the approved plan: UI layouts, forms, client-side state management, API call integrations, input validation. Satisfy all plan acceptance criteria. Output complete working code files and note: what was built, which acceptance criteria were addressed, and any implementation decisions.

Implement all backend components per the approved plan: API endpoints, business logic services, auth/authorization, input validation, external system integrations. Satisfy all plan acceptance criteria. Output complete working code files and note: what was built, which acceptance criteria were addressed, and any implementation decisions.

Implement all database components per the approved plan: schema definitions, migrations, indexes, queries, data access layer. Satisfy all plan acceptance criteria. Output complete working code files and note: what was built, which acceptance criteria were addressed, and any implementation decisions.

Increment code_review_iteration by 1. Review all frontend, backend, and database code against the plan's acceptance criteria. Check: correctness, criterion completeness, code quality/consistency, security, and cross-component integration. If all criteria met and production-ready: set code_approved=true. Otherwise: set code_approved=false and output a report specifying which criteria are unmet and what each agent must fix.

Write an implementation summary with these sections: 1) What Was Built (feature overview and components), 2) Architecture (frontend/backend/database integration), 3) Acceptance Criteria Checklist (each criterion: met/partially met/not met), 4) Setup and Deployment Instructions (step-by-step), 5) Code Review Summary (findings and known limitations), 6) Future Improvements. Ground every statement in the approved plan and actual code produced.

variables.description: Indicates whether the plan reviewer has feedback requiring further revision; 'true' means feedback exists, 'false' means the plan is satisfactory
Counter tracking how many plan review cycles have been completed
The human reviewer's decision on the implementation plan; 'approve' to proceed with implementation, 'reject' to request revisions
Indicates whether the code reviewer has approved all code as production-ready; 'true' means approved, 'false' means issues remain
Counter tracking how many code review cycles have been completed
